SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YERAHIAN, CLAUDIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GENERAL GROWTH PROPERTIES, INC. STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER L.L.C $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL GROWTH PROPERTIES, INC.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GENERAL GROWTH PROPERTIES, INC., STONESTOWN SHOPPING CENTER L.L.C IS GRANTED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JON JORGENSEN--OPERATIONS MANAGER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
